Jensen Huang:

“We say things like, ‘We don't understand it at all.’ It is not true. We understand a lot of things about this technology.”

Travis Kalanick: Tesla is the Google of the Physical AI Era

“I like to break down the physical AI stack: (it) includes computation, a physical AI model, all the things you think of.”

“What about land? Development? That should be in that stack. What about chemistry? That needs to be in the stack. Manufacturing needs to be a stack.”

“ ICE is more popular than AI. That's where AI is.”

“Entrepreneurs are A/B testing what it takes to raise money.”
